title: Top Surgeon by Billable Volume per Department (ties kept)

landmines.name: ranking-ties-dropped
landmines.kills: naive/1_row_number_drops_ties.sql -- ROW_NUMBER() ... = 1 keeps exactly one surgeon per department and silently discards co-leaders who tie for the top count; RANK()/DENSE_RANK() keeps them all

landmines.name: missing-billable-filter
landmines.kills: naive/2_forgot_billable_filter.sql -- counting all procedures instead of only is_billable = 1 changes the counts and, in some departments, the winning surgeon

notes: Department is attached via the procedure's admission's admitting ward (procedures -> admissions -> wards). Volume is COUNT(*) over billable procedure rows (each procedure counts, even several within one admission), filtered to is_billable = 1 AND primary_surgeon_id IS NOT NULL. Ties for the top count within a department are all kept via RANK() = 1. Fully portable (window function + COUNT); no per-engine override needed.
